_comment: bytecode phase excluded: the native Vader compiler (the snapshot oracle) cannot yet emit bytecode for this snippet — `dump --stage=bytecode` panics 'unresolved callee' (GATE B1 namespace/import impl-member materialisation gap, tracked in the §9 self-host audit). All earlier stages emit deterministically and are snapshotted normally; vader_vm.test.ts auto-skips it (no bytecode.snapshot.virt).
